title: udisks2 security update
overview: An update for Oracle Linux is now available for Oracle Linux 10.
description:
[2.10.90-6.0.1.el10_1.1]
- Enable btrfs support for OL supported arches [Orabug: 37464632]

[2.10.90-6.1]
- Add missing polkit check for RestoreEncryptedHeader() (CVE-2026-26103) (RHEL-148565)
- Add missing polkit check for HeaderBackup() (CVE-2026-26104) (RHEL-148588)
full_text:
[2.10.90-6.0.1.el10_1.1]
- Enable btrfs support for OL supported arches [Orabug: 37464632]

[2.10.90-6.1]
- Add missing polkit check for RestoreEncryptedHeader() (CVE-2026-26103) (RHEL-148565)
- Add missing polkit check for HeaderBackup() (CVE-2026-26104) (RHEL-148588)

References:
https://linux.oracle.com/errata/ELSA-2026-3476.html
https://linux.oracle.com/cve/CVE-2026-26103.html
https://linux.oracle.com/cve/CVE-2026-26104.html
